text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hoppity-jam, floppity-jam! Tell me<n>my luck for
today's training session...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You know what that means! Act like<n>the old-timey
aristocrats and find the<n>most auspicious route to
the<n>destination!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All right, first I need to direct myself to<n>the most
auspicious coordinates...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh! To think such a delightful place<n>awaits me
beyond my auspicious<n>orienteering!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: This is the perfect time for a little<n>breather!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Of course, this doesn't mean having<n>fun or
anything unbecoming like that!<n>This is just to
prepare myself for my<n>training!
